title: antennaria neodioica subsp. howellii
intro: Antennaria neodioica subsp. howellii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as mountain silver, and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Antennaria neodioica subsp. howellii include its potential to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
